hero.title: Authentic Italian Soul
hero.subtitle: A cinematic journey through the heart of Austria, served in every dish.

about.title: A Legacy of Passion
about.story: Founded in 1982, da Giovanni has been bringing the authentic taste of Italy to the heart of Europe. Our journey started in a small kitchen with big dreams and a handful of family recipes passed down through generations.

footer.newsletter: Join our newsletter for seasonal specials.
